title: Vanilla+ Armor Durability Overlay [No Optifine]
description: Implements an armor hud for 1.21.4+ using the "varients-cit" mod for the Marlowww texturepack
body:
**Vanilla+ Armor Durability** works **without optifine** what means you can use it with sodium. It uses a mod called **"varients-cit"** to make this work. It works on **all versions above 1.21.4** even if it says incompatible ingame

With this texturepack you can improve the vanilla+ texturepack **a lot**. Its the one of the most used pvp packs but still hasnt got a fitting armor hud so why dont make one. 

![Showcase](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/152348d8b9227843d3e800b22c3f7a430cf54b81.png)

The pack supports **diamond** and **netherite armor**
